description_long: This is a two-story detached house set on a spacious, landscaped lot with a large grassy yard and a driveway leading to the main road. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a brick exterior, complemented by white-trimmed windows and a covered front porch. The property is bordered by a mix of dense trees and hedges, providing privacy and a natural boundary. The front yard includes a small garden area and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, which is accented by steps and decorative columns. The rear of the house opens to a backyard with additional greenery and open space, ideal for outdoor activities. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural neighborhood, with the house positioned centrally on the lot and surrounded by open lawn and mature landscaping.
description: A two-story brick house with a gable roof, white-trimmed windows, and a covered front porch, set on a large, landscaped lot with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, steps, and a landscaped front yard bordered by trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side yard, and the dense tree line at the rear of the property.
description_view_2: Street-facing view displaying the house's symmetrical facade, driveway, and the open lawn extending to the road.
description_view_3: Rear-side view revealing the backyard, additional greenery, and the back of the house with access to the open space.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, decorative columns, and white trim
